retry_cache: Arc<RetryCache>,\n}\n\nimpl ProxyState {\n    /// Create a new proxy state from configuration.\n    pub fn new(config: MiroirConfig) -> Result<Self> {\n        // Build topology from config nodes\n        let mut topology = Topology::new(config.shards, config.replication_factor as usize);\n\n        for node_config in &config.nodes {\n            let node = Node::new(\n                NodeId::new(node_config.id.clone()),\n                node_config.address.clone(),\n                node_config.replica_group,\n            );\n            topology.add_node(node);\n        }\n\n        // Validate topology matches config\n        if topology.replica_group_count() != config.replica_groups {\n            return Err(MiroirError::Config(format!(\n                \"Topology has {} groups but config specifies {}\",\n                topology.replica_group_count(),\n                config.replica_groups\n            )));\n        }\n\n        let client = Arc::new(NodeClient::new(\n            config.node_master_key.clone(),\n            &config.server,\n        ));\n\n        // Use master_key from config (already loaded with env var override)\n Arc::new(TaskManager::new());\n        let retry_cache = Arc::new(RetryCache::new(std::time::Duration::from_secs(60)));\n\n        Ok(Self {\n            config: Arc::new(config),\n            topology: Arc::new(RwLock::new(topology)),\n            client,\n            query_seq: Arc::new(AtomicU64::new(0)),\n            master_key,\n            admin_key,\n            metrics,\n            task_manager,\n            retry_cache,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Increment and get the next query sequence number.\n    pub fn next_query_seq(&self) -> u64 {\n        self.query_seq.fetch_add(1, {\n364\t    #[serde(default)]\n365\t    pub enabled: bool,\n366\t}\n367\t\n368\t/// Policy for handling unavailable shards during scatter.\n369\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n370\t#[serde(rename_all = \"snake_case\")]\n371\tpub enum UnavailableShardPolicy {\n372\t    /// Return partial results from available nodes.\n373\t    Partial,\n374\t    /// Fail the request if any shard is unavailable.\n375\t    Error,\n376\t    /// Fall back to another replica group for unavailable shards.\n377\t    Fallback,\n378\t}\n379\t\n380\timpl Default for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n381\t    fn default() -> Self {\n382\t        Self::Partial\n383\t    }\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\timpl std::fmt::Display for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n387\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n388\t        match self {\n389\t            Self::Partial => write!(f, \"partial\"),\n390\t            Self::Error => write!(f, \"error\"),\n391\t            Self::Fallback => write!(f, \"fallback\"),\n392\t        }\n393\t    }\n394\t}\n395\t\n396\t#[cfg(test)]\n397\tmod tests {\n398\t    use super::*;\n399\t\n400\t    /// Returns a minimal Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"snake_case\")]\npub enum UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    /// Return partial results from available nodes.\n    Partial,\n    /// Fail the request if any shard is unavailable.\n    Error,\n    /// Fall back to another replica group for unavailable shards.\n    Fallback,\n}\n\nimpl Default for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    fn default() -> Self {\n        Self::Partial\n    }\n}\n\nimpl std::fmt::Display for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n        match self {\n            Self::Partial => write!(f, \"partial\"),\n            Self::Error => write!(f, \"error\"),\n            Self::Fallback => write!(f, \"fallback\"),\n        }\n topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    group_id: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    req_body: &[u8],\n    query_seq: u64,\n    _limit: usize,\n    _offset: usize,\n    _client_requested_score: bool,\n    _facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n) -> Result<(Vec<CoreShardResponse>, bool, Vec<u32>), ErrorResponse> {\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n\n    // Build covering set for all shards\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index),\n        body: req_body.to_vec(),\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    // Scatter search to all nodes in covering set\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(topology, covering.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Build shard responses for merger\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<CoreShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n    let          success: true,\n            });\n        } else {\n            // No response from this node's shard\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id }\n    }\n\n    Ok((shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/:index/search - Search documents.\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    req: Json<SearchRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n\n    // primary group first\n    let primary_group_id = query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n    let (mut shard_responses, mut any_degraded, mut failed_shard_ids) = search_with_group(\n facets.clone(),\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    // If we have failed shards and there are other replica groups, try group fallback\n    if !failed_shard_ids.is_empty() && state.config.replica_groups > 1 {\n        let replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups;\n        let mut fallback_attempts = 0;\n        const MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 2; // Limit fallback attempts to avoid cascading\n\n        // Try other groups for the failed shards\n        for fallback_offset in 1..replica_groups as u64 {\n            if fallback_attempts >= MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS {\n                break;\n            }\n\n            let fallback_group_id = (primary_group_id as u64 + fallback_offset) % replica_groups as u64;\n            if fallback_group_id == primary_group_id as u64 {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Try the fallback group for all failed shards\n            let (fallback_responses, fallback_degraded, fallback_failed) = search_with_group(\n offset,\n                client_requested_score,\n                req.facets.clone(),\n            )\n            .await?;\n\n            // Merge the successful responses from fallback into our main failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    // Try to find a successful response from fallback\n                    if let Some(fallback_resp) = fallback_responses.iter().find(|r| r.shard_id == shard_id && r.success) {\n                        shard_resp.body = fallback_resp.body.clone();\n                        shard_resp.success = true;\n                        // Remove from failed list\n                        failed_shard_ids.retain(|&id| id != shard_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            if fallback_degraded {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            }\n\n            // Update failed_shard_ids with any new failures from fallback\n            for &shard_id in &fallback_failed {\n                if !failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id);\n                }\n            }\n\n            fallback_attempts += 1;\n\n            // If we've recovered all failed shards, stop trying fallbacks\n            if failed_shard_ids.is_empty() {\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if we failed completely\n    let successful_count = shard_responses.iter().filter(|s| s.success).count();\n    if successful_count == 0 {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"All shards failed\"));\n    }\n\n    // Merge results\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if any shards failed (degraded mode)\n    let degraded = any_degraded || merged.degraded;\n\n    // Build response\n    let    processing_time_ms: merged.processing_time_ms,\n        facet_distribution: if merged.facets.as_object().map_or(false, |o| !o.is_empty()) {\n            Some(merged.facets)\n        } else {\n            None\n        },\n        ranking_score_threshold: req.ranking_score_threshold,\n    };\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(200);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any shard failed\n    if degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder\n        .body(Json(search_response).into_response().into_body())\n        .unwrap())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_deserialization() {\n scatter::HttpScatter,\n26\t    state::ProxyState,\n27\t};\n28\t\n29\t/// Documents router.\n30\tpub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n31\t    axum::Router::new()\n32\t        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n33\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n34\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n35\t        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n36\t        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n37\t        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n38\t}\n39\t\n40\t/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\n41\t/// First checks the index settings, then falls back to headers and defaults.\n42\tasync fn get_primary_key(\n43\t    state: &ProxyState,\n44\t    index: &str,\n45\t    documents: &[Value],\n46\t    headers: &HeaderMap,\n47\t) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n48\t    // First, try to get primary key from index settings\n49\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n50\t\n51\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n52\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n53\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n54\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n55\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n56\t                body: vec![],\n57\t                headers: vec![],\n58\t            };\n59\t\n60\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n61\t\n62\t            if let Ok(result) = scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n63\t                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n64\t                    if resp.status == 200 {\n65\t                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n66\t                            if let Some(pk) = json.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n67\t                                return Ok(pk.to_string());\n68\t                            }\n69\t                        }\n70\t                    }\n71\t                }\n72\t            }\n73\t        }\n74\t    }\n75\t\n76\t    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n77\t    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Miroir-Primary-Key\") {\n78\t        if let Ok(pk_str) = pk.to_str() {\n79\t            return Ok(pk_str.to_string());\n80\t        }\n81\t    }\n82\t\n83\t    // Try to infer from first document\n84\t    if let Some(doc) = documents.first() {\n85\t        // Common primary key field names to try\n86\t        for candidate in &[\"id\", \"Id\", \"ID\", \"_id\", \"key\", \"Key\", \"pk\"] {\n87\t            if doc.get(*candidate).is_some() {\n88\t                return Ok(candidate.to_string());\n89\t            }\n90\t        }\n91\t    }\n92\t\n93\t    // Default to \"id\"\n94\t    Ok(\"id\".to_string())\n95\t}\n96\t\n97\t/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\n98\tasync fn add_documents(\n99\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n100\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n101\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n102\t    Json(body): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n103\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n104\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n105\t\n106\t    // Get primary key for the index\n107\t    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &index, &body, &headers).await?;\n108\t\n109\t    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n110\t    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n111\t\n112\t    for mut doc in body {\n113\t        let pk_value = doc\n114\t            .get(primary_key.as_str())\n115\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n116\t            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n117\t\n118\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n119\t\n120\t        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n121\t        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n122\t            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n123\t        }\n124\t\n125\t        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n126\t    }\n127\t\n128\t    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n129\t    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n130\t    let mut any_degraded = false;\n131\t    let mut any_success = false;\n132\t\n133\t    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n134\t        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n135\t\n136\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n137\t            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n138\t        }\n139\t\n140\t        // Build request body\n141\t        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n142\t\n143\t        let request = ScatterRequest {\n144\t            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n145\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n146\t            body: body_bytes,\n147\t            headers: vec![],\n148\t        };\n149\t\n150\t        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n151\t            (*state.client).clone(),\n152\t            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n153\t            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n154\t        );\n155\t        let result = scatter\n156\t            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n157\t            .await\n158\t            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n159\t\n160\t        // Check quorum per replica group\n161\t        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n162\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n163\t\n164\t        // Group responses by replica group\n165\t        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n166\t        for resp in &result.responses {\n167\t            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n168\t            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n169\t        }\n170\t\n171\t        // Check if each group met quorum\n172\t        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n173\t            if *count < quorum {\n174\t                any_degraded = true;\n175\t            } else {\n176\t                any_success = true;\n177\t            }\n178\t        }\n179\t\n180\t        // Merge responses\n181\t        for resp in result.responses {\n182\t            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n183\t                all_responses.push(json);\n184\t            }\n185\t        }\n186\t    }\n187\t\n188\t    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n189\t    if !any_success {\n190\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n191\t    }\n192\t\n193\t    // Build response with proper task UID\n194\t    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n195\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n196\t        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n197\t        \"indexUid\": index,\n198\t        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n199\t        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n200\t        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n201\t    });\n202\t\n203\t    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n204\t\n205\t    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n206\t    if any_degraded {\n207\t        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n208\t            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n209\t        }\n210\t    }\n211\t\n212\t    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n213\t}\n214\t\n215\t/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\n216\tasync fn update_documents(\n217\t    State(state): as usize;\n418\t\n419\t    // Build covering set for this shard\n420\t    let covering = miroir_core::router::covering_set(1, group, rf, query_seq);\n421\t\n422\t    // Query the node responsible for this shard\n423\t    let target = covering\n424\t        .first()\n425\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes in covering set\"))?;\n426\t\n427\t    let request = };\n433\t\n434\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n435\t    let result = scatter\n436\t        .scatter(&topology, Json(body)).into_response())\n455\t}\n456\t\n457\t#[cfg(test)]\n458\tmod tests {\n459\t    use super::*;\n460\t\n461\t    #[test]\n462\t    fn test_document_shard_hashing() {\n463\t        // Test that same ID always maps to same shard\n464\t        let id1 = \"test-doc-123\";\n465\t        let id2 = \"test-doc-123\";\n466\t        let id3 = \"different-doc\";\n467\t\n468\t        // These assert_eq!(shard1, shard2, \"Same ID should map to same shard\");\n474\t        assert_ne!(shard1, shard3, \"Different IDs should likely map to different shards\");\n475\t    }\n476\t\n477\t    #[test]\n478\t    fn test_document_shard_uniformity() {\n479\t        // Test that documents distribute reasonably evenly\n480\t        let mut shard_counts = vec![0usize; 64];\n481\t\n482\t        for i in 0..1000 {\n483\t            let id = format!(\"doc-{}\", i);\n484\t            let shard = shard_for_key(&id, 64);\n485\t            shard_counts[shard as usize] += 1;\n486\t        }\n487\t\n488\t        // Check that each shard got at least some documents\n489\t        // (with 1000 docs and 64 shards, most should get at least 10-20)\n490\t        let min_count = min_count);\n494\t        assert!(max_count <= 30, \"Maximum shard count too high: {}\", max_count);\n495\t    }\n496\t}\n497\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"319616d2-54d4-40cf-bd50-55bcf90c5a14","uuid":"6dabdcd9-bc2e-48ae-ad6a-a1fdeda6cb3e","timestamp":"2026-05-09T19:36:40.766Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-proxy/src/routes/documents.rs","content":"//! Document routes: POST, PUT, DELETE, GET /documents\n//!\n//! Implements the write path per plan §2:\n//! - Hash primary key to get shard ID\n//! - Inject _miroir_shard field\n//! - Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n//! - Per-group quorum (floor(RF/2)+1)\n//! - X-Miroir-Degraded header on any group missing quorum\n//! - 503 miroir_no_quorum only when no group met quorum\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::{shard_for_key, write_targets},\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Documents router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n}\n\n/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\n/// First checks the index settings, then falls back to headers and defaults.\nasync fn get_primary_key(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    documents: &[Value],\n    headers: &HeaderMap,\n) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n    // First, try to get primary key from index settings\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            if let Some(pk) = json.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n                                return Ok(pk.to_string());\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Miroir-Primary-Key\") {\n        if let Ok(pk_str) = pk.to_str() {\n            return Ok(pk_str.to_string());\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Try to infer from first document\n    if let Some(doc) = documents.first() {\n        // Common primary key field names to try\n        for candidate in &[\"id\", \"Id\", \"ID\", \"_id\", \"key\", \"Key\", \"pk\"] {\n            if doc.get(*candidate).is_some() {\n                return Ok(candidate.to_string());\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Default to \"id\"\n    Ok(\"id\".to_string())\n}\n\n/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\nasync fn add_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(body): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get primary key for the index\n    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &index, &body, &headers).await?;\n\n    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for mut doc in body {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key.as_str())\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n\n        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n        }\n\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        // Build request body\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        // Group responses by replica group\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check if each group met quorum\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Merge responses\n        for resp in result.responses {\n            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                all_responses.push(json);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    // Build response with proper task UID\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\nasync fn update_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(body): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Same logic as POST, just different type\n    add_documents(State(state), Path(index), headers, Json(body)).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents - Delete documents by batch.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Extract filter or IDs from request body\n    let ids = body\n        .get(\"ids\")\n        .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Missing 'ids' field in delete request\"))?;\n\n    // Group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for id_val in ids {\n        let id = id_val\n            .as_str()\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"ID must be a string\"))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, state.config.shards);\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.to_string());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter delete to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, ids) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": ids \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n replica group\n    // Use the query group (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = miroir_core::router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n = StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::OK);\n    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_document_shard_hashing() {\n        // Test that same ID always maps to same shard\n        let id1 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id2 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id3 = \"different-doc\";\n\n        // These should be deterministic\n        let shard1 = shard_for_key(id1, 64);\n        let shard2 = shard_for_key(id2, 64);\n        let shard3 = shard_for_key(id3, 64);\n\n        assert_eq!(shard1, shard2, \"Same ID should map to same shard\");\n        assert_ne!(shard1, shard3, \"Different IDs should likely map to different shards\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_document_shard_uniformity() {\n        // Test that documents distribute reasonably evenly\n        let mut shard_counts = vec![0usize; 64];\n\n        for i in 0..1000 {\n            let id = format!(\"doc-{}\", i);\n            let shard = shard_for_key(&id, 64);\n            shard_counts[shard as usize] += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check that each shard got at least some documents\n {\n72\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n73\t\n74\t    // Query the first node in each replica group for index list\n75\t    let results: Vec<serde_json::Value> = Vec::new();\n76\t\n77\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n78\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n79\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n80\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n81\t                path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n82\t                body: vec![],\n83\t                headers: vec![],\n84\t            };\n85\t\n86\t            let scatter =\n87\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n88\t\n89\t            let result = scatter\n90\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n91\t                .await\n92\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n93\t\n94\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n95\t                if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n96\t                    if let Some(arr) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n97\t                        // Return results from first successful group\n98\t                        return Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": arr })));\n99\t                    }\n100\t                }\n101\t            }\n102\t        }\n103\t    }\n104\t\n105\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": results })))\n106\t}\n107\t\n108\t/// POST /indexes - Create a new index.\n109\tasync fn create_index(\n110\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n111\t    req: Json<CreateIndexRequest>,\n112\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n113\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n114\t\n115\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (use shard 0 as representative)\n116\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n117\t\n118\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n119\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n120\t    }\n121\t\n122\t    // Build request with _miroir_shard injected into filterableAttributes\n123\t    let create_req = serde_json::json!({\n124\t        \"uid\": req.uid,\n125\t        \"primaryKey\": req.primary_key,\n126\t    });\n127\t\n128\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&create_req).unwrap_or_default();\n129\t\n130\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n131\t        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n132\t        path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n133\t        body: body_bytes,\n134\t        headers: vec![],\n135\t    };\n136\t\n137\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n138\t    let result = scatter\n139\t        .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n140\t        .await\n141\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n142\t\n143\t    // Check if creation succeeded on quorum\n144\t    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n145\t    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n146\t\n147\t    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n148\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n149\t            \"Failed to create index on quorum of nodes\",\n150\t        ));\n151\t    }\n152\t\n153\t    // Return first response\n154\t    let resp = result\n155\t        .responses\n156\t        .first()\n157\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n158\t\n159\t    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n160\t\n161\t    // After index creation, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n162\t    // We do this by updating the settings on all nodes\n163\t    if status.is_success() {\n164\t        let filterable_req = ScatterRequest {\n165\t            method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n166\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings/filterable-attributes\", req.uid),\n167\t            body: serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"])).unwrap_or_default(),\n168\t            headers: vec![],\n169\t        };\n170\t\n171\t        let _ = scatter\n172\t            .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), filterable_req, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n173\t            .await;\n174\t    }\n175\t\n176\t    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n177\t        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n178\t\n179\t    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n180\t}\n181\t\n182\t/// GET /indexes/:index - Get index metadata.\n183\tasync fn get_index(\n184\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n185\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n186\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n187\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n188\t\n189\t    // Query the first available node\n190\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n191\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n192\t            let headers: vec![],\n197\t            };\n198\t\n199\t            let scatter =\n200\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n201\t\n202\t            let result = scatter\n203\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n204\t                .await\n205\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n206\t\n207\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n208\t                let status = resp.status;\n209\t                if status == 200 {\n210\t                    if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n211\t                        return Ok(Json(json));\n212\t                    }\n213\t                } else if status == 404 {\n214\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n215\t                }\n216\t            }\n217\t        }\n218\t    }\n219\t\n220\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n221\t}\n222\t\n223\t/// DELETE /indexes/:index - Delete an index.\n224\tasync fn delete_index(\n225\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n226\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n227\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n228\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n229\t\n230\t    // Broadcast to all nodes\n231\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n232\t\n233\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n234\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n235\t    }\n236\t\n237\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n238\t        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n239\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n240\t        body: vec![],\n241\t        headers: vec![],\n242\t    };\n243\t\n244\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n245\t    let result = scatter\n246\t        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n247\t        .await\n248\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n249\t\n250\t    // Check if deletion succeeded on quorum\n251\t    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n252\t    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n253\t\n254\t    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n255\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n256\t            \"Failed to delete index on quorum of nodes\",\n257\t        ));\n258\t    }\n259\t\n260\t    // Return first response\n261\t    let resp = result\n262\t        .responses\n263\t        .first()\n264\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n265\t\n266\t    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n267\t\n268\t    Ok((status, Json(resp.body.clone())).into_response())\n269\t}\n270\t\n271\t/// GET /indexes/:index/stats - Get index statistics.\n272\tasync fn get_index_stats(\n273\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n274\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n275\t) -> Result<Json<IndexStatsResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n276\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n277\t\n278\t    let mut total_documents = 0u64;\n279\t    let mut is_indexing = false;\n280\t    let mut field_distributions: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n281\t\n282\t    // Aggregate stats from all replica groups\n283\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n284\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n285\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n286\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n287\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", index),\n288\t                body: vec![],\n289\t                headers: vec![],\n290\t            };\n291\t\n292\t            let scatter =\n293\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n294\t\n295\t            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n296\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n297\t                .await\n298\t            {\n299\t                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n300\t                    if resp.status == 200 {\n301\t                        // Parse response body as JSON\n302\t                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n303\t                            // Extract stats\n304\t                            if let Some(docs) = json.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n305\t                            {\n306\t                                // Use max document count across replicas (more accurate)\n307\t                                total_documents = total_documents.max(docs);\n308\t                            }\n309\t\n310\t                            if let Some(indexing) = json.get(\"isIndexing\").and_then(|v| v.as_bool()) {\n311\t                                is_indexing = is_indexing || indexing;\n312\t                            }\n313\t\n314\t                            if let Some(fields) = json.get(\"fieldDistribution\") {\n315\t                                field_distributions.push(fields.clone());\n316\t                            }\n317\t                        }\n318\t                    }\n319\t                }\n320\t            }\n321\t        }\n322\t    }\n323\t\n324\t    // Merge field distributions\n325\t    let merged_fields = merge_field_distributions(field_distributions);\n326\t\n327\t    Ok(Json(IndexStatsResponse {\n328\t        number_of_documents: total_documents,\n329\t        is_indexing,\n330\t        field_distribution: merged_fields,\n331\t    }))\n332\t}\n333\t\n334\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get index settings.\n335\tasync fn get_settings(\n336\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n337\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n338\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n339\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n340\t\n341\t    // Query the first available node\n342\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n343\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n344\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n345\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n346\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n347\t                body: vec![],\n348\t                headers: vec![],\n349\t            };\n350\t\n351\t            let scatter =\n352\t                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n353\t\n354\t            let result = scatter\n355\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n356\t                .await\n357\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n358\t\n359\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n360\t                let status = resp.status;\n361\t                if status == 200 {\n362\t                    return Ok(Json(resp.body.clone().into()));\n363\t                } else if status == 404 {\n364\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n365\t                }\n366\t            }\n367\t        }\n368\t    }\n369\t\n370\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n371\t}\n372\t\n373\t/// Merge field distributions from multiple nodes.\n374\tfn merge_field_distributions(distributions: Vec<Value>) -> Value {\n375\t    use std::collections::HashMap;\n376\t\n377\t    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n378\t\n379\t    for dist in distributions {\n380\t        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n381\t            for (field, value) in obj {\n382\t                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n383\t                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n384\t                    for (k, v) in inner {\n385\t                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n386\t                            *entry.entry(k.clone()).or_insert(0) += count;\n387\t                        }\n388\t                    }\n389\t                }\n390\t            }\n391\t        }\n392\t    }\n393\t\n394\t    // Convert back to JSON\n395\t    let mut result = serde_json::Map::new();\n396\t    for (field, inner) in merged {\n397\t        let inner_obj: serde_json::Map<String, Value> = inner\n398\t            .into_iter()\n399\t            .map(|(k, v)| (k, serde_json::json!(v)))\n400\t            .collect();\n401\t        result.insert(field, serde_json::json!(inner_obj));\n402\t    }\n403\t\n404\t Index routes: GET, POST, DELETE /indexes\n//!\n//! Implements index lifecycle per plan §3:\n//! - Create broadcasts to all nodes + injects _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n//! - Settings sequential apply-with-rollback (Phase 5 / §13.5)\n//! - crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Indexes router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_indexes).post(create_index))\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::get(get_index).delete(delete_index))\n        .route(\"/:index/stats\", axum::routing::get(get_index_stats))\n        .route(\"/:index/settings\", axum::routing::get(get_settings))\n}\n\n/// Index creation request.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\nstruct CreateIndexRequest {\n    uid: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Index metadata response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct IndexResponse {\n    uid: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n    created_at: String,\n    updated_at: String,\n}\n\n/// Index list response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\nstruct IndexListResponse {\n    results: Vec<IndexResponse>,\n}\n\n/// Index stats response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct IndexStatsResponse {\n    number_of_documents: u64,\n    is_indexing: bool,\n    field_distribution: Value,\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes - List all indexes.\nasync fn list_indexes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query the first node in each replica group for index list\n    let results: Vec<serde_json::Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n                HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                    if let Some(arr) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n                        // Return results from first successful group\n                        return Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": arr })));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({ \"results\": results })))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes - Create a new index.\nasync fn create_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    req: Json<CreateIndexRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes (use shard 0 as representative)\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Build request with _miroir_shard injected into filterableAttributes\n    let create_req = serde_json::json!({\n        \"uid\": req.uid,\n        \"primaryKey\": req.primary_key,\n    });\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&create_req).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: \"/indexes\".to_string(),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if creation succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\n            \"Failed to create index on quorum of nodes\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Return first response\n    let resp = result\n        .responses\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No response from nodes\"))?;\n\n    let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n\n    // After index creation, inject _miroir_shard into filterableAttributes\n    // We do this by updating the settings on all nodes\n    if status.is_success() {\n        let filterable_req = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings/filterable-attributes\", req.uid),\n            body: serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"])).unwrap_or_default(),\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let _ = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), filterable_req, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await;\n    }\n\n    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n\n    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index - Get index metadata.\nasync fn HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index - Delete an index.\nasync fn delete_index(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if deletion succeeded on quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    if result.responses.len() < quorum {\n        return statistics.\nasync fn get_index_stats(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<IndexStatsResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let mut total_documents = 0u64;\n    let mut is_indexing = false;\n    let mut field_distributions: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Aggregate stats from all replica groups\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/stats\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter =\n      // Parse response body as JSON\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            // Extract stats\n                            if let Some(docs) = json.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n                            {\n                                // Use max document count across replicas (more accurate)\n                                total_documents = total_documents.max(docs);\n                            }\n\n                            if let Some(indexing) = json.get(\"isIndexing\").and_then(|v|       }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Merge field distributions\n    let merged_fields = merge_field_distributions(field_distributions);\n\n    Ok(Json(IndexStatsResponse {\n multiple nodes.\nfn merge_field_distributions(distributions: Vec<Value>) -> Value {\n    use std::collections::HashMap;\n\n    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for dist in distributions {\n        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n            for (field, value) in obj {\n                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n                    for (k, v) in inner {\n                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n                            *entry.entry(k.clone()).or_insert(0) += count;\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Convert back to JSON\n    let mut result update_setting_with_rollback(\n124\t    state: &ProxyState,\n125\t    index: &str,\n126\t    setting_path: &str,\n127\t    value: &Value,\n128\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n129\t    let available\"));\n134\t    }\n135\t\n136\t    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n137\t    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n138\t\n139\t    for target in &targets {\n140\t        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n141\t            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n142\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n143\t            body: vec![],\n144\t            headers: vec![],\n145\t        };\n146\t\n147\t        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n148\t\n149\t        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n150\t            Ok(resp) => {\n151\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n152\t                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n153\t                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n154\t                    } else {\n155\t                        None\n156\t                    };\n157\t                    rollback_values.insert(\n158\t                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n159\t                        RollbackValue {\n160\t                            original_value,\n161\t                            existed: r.status == 200,\n162\t                        },\n163\t                    );\n164\t                }\n165\t            }\n166\t            Err(_) => {\n167\t                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n168\t                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n169\t                    original_value: None,\n170\t                    existed: false,\n171\t                });\n172\t            }\n173\t        }\n174\t    }\n175\t\n176\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n177\t\n178\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n179\t        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n180\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n181\t        body: body_bytes,\n182\t        headers: vec![],\n183\t    };\n184\t\n185\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n186\t\n187\t    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n188\t    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n189\t    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n190\t\n191\t    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n192\t    for target in &targets {\n193\t        let result = scatter\n194\t            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n195\t            .await;\n196\t\n197\t        match result {\n198\t            Ok(resp) => {\n199\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n200\t                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n201\t                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n202\t                        let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n203\t                        last_response = Some(body);\n204\t                    } else {\n205\t                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n206\t                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n207\t                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n208\t                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n209\t                            target.as_str(),\n210\t                            r.status\n211\t                        )));\n212\t                    }\n213\t                }\n214\t            }\n215\t            Err(e) => {\n216\t                // Rollback from successful nodes\n217\t                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n218\t                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n219\t                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n220\t                    target.as_str(),\n221\t                    e\n222\t                )));\n223\t            }\n224\t        }\n225\t    }\n226\t\n227\t    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n228\t        body\n229\t    } else {\n230\t        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n231\t        serde_json::json!({\n232\t            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n233\t            \"indexUid\": index,\n234\t            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n235\t            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n236\t            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n237\t        })\n238\t    };\n239\t\n240\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n241\t}\n242\t\n243\t/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\n244\tasync fn rollback_setting(\n245\t    state: &ProxyState,\n246\t    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n247\t    successful_nodes: &[String],\n248\t    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n249\t    index: &str,\n250\t    setting_path: &str,\n251\t) {\n252\t    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n253\t        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n254\t            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n255\t            if rollback.existed {\n256\t                // Restore original value\n257\t                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n258\t                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n259\t                    let _ = state\n260\t                        .client\n261\t                        .send_to_node(\n262\t                            topology,\n263\t                            &node_id_ref,\n264\t                            \"PUT\",\n265\t                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n266\t                            Some(&body_bytes),\n267\t                            &[],\n268\t                        )\n269\t                        .await;\n270\t                }\n271\t            } else {\n272\t                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n273\t                let _ = state\n274\t                    .client\n275\t                    .send_to_node(\n276\t                        topology,\n277\t                        &node_id_ref,\n278\t                        \"DELETE\",\n279\t                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n280\t                        None,\n281\t                        &[],\n282\t                    )\n283\t                    .await;\n284\t            }\n285\t        }\n286\t    }\n287\t}\n288\t\n289\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n290\tasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n291\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n292\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n293\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n294\t    get_setting(&state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n295\t}\n296\t\n297\t/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n298\tasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n299\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n300\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n301\t    body: Json<Value>,\n302\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n303\t    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n304\t    let mut updated = body.0.clone();\n305\t    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n306\t        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n307\t            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n308\t        }\n309\t    }\n310\t    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n314\tasync fn delete_filterable_attributes(\n315\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n316\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n317\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n318\t    // Reset to default but always include _miroir_shard\n319\t    let default = serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"]);\n320\t    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &default).await\n321\t}\n322\t\n323\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\n324\tasync fn get_searchable_attributes(\n325\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n326\t    Path(index):  index: &str,\n577\t    setting_path: &str,\n578\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n579\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n580\t\n581\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n582\t Implements settings broadcast per plan §3:\n//! - Sequential apply-with-rollback on failure\n//! - Broadcast to all nodes\n//! - Rollback from successful nodes if any fail\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Settings router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(get_all_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/filterable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_filterable_attributes).put(update_filterable_attributes).delete(delete_filterable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/searchable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_searchable_attributes).put(update_searchable_attributes).delete(delete_searchable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/sortable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_sortable_attributes).put(update_sortable_attributes).delete(delete_sortable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/displayed-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_displayed_attributes).put(update_displayed_attributes).delete(delete_displayed_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/ranking-rules\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_ranking_rules).put(update_ranking_rules).delete(delete_ranking_rules),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/stop-words\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_stop_words).put(update_stop_words).delete(delete_stop_words),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/synonyms\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_synonyms).put(update_synonyms).delete(delete_synonyms),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/distinct-attribute\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_distinct_attribute).put(update_distinct_attribute).delete(delete_distinct_attribute),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/typo-tolerance\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_typo_tolerance).put(update_typo_tolerance).delete(delete_typo_tolerance),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/faceting\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_faceting).put(update_faceting).delete(delete_faceting),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/pagination\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_pagination).put(update_pagination).delete(delete_pagination),\n        )\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get all settings.\nasync fn get_all_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if resp.status == 200 {\n                    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n                        .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n                    return Ok(Json(body));\n                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// Cached original value for rollback.\nstruct RollbackValue {\n    /// The original value to restore on rollback.\n    original_value: Option<Value>,\n    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n    existed: bool,\n}\n\n/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\nasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n    value: &Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for target in &targets {\n        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n            body: vec![],\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n                    } else {\n                        None\n                    };\n                    rollback_values.insert(\n                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n                        RollbackValue {\n                            original_value,\n                            existed: r.status == 200,\n                        },\n                    );\n                }\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n                    original_value: None,\n                    existed: false,\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n\n    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n    for target in &targets {\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n            .await;\n\n        match result {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n                        let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n                        last_response = Some(body);\n                    } else {\n                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n                            target.as_str(),\n                            r.status\n                        )));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                // Rollback from successful nodes\n                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n                    target.as_str(),\n                    e\n                )));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n        body\n    } else {\n        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n        serde_json::json!({\n            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n            \"indexUid\": index,\n            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        })\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\nasync fn rollback_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    successful_nodes: &[String],\n    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) {\n    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n            if rollback.existed {\n                // Restore original value\n                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n                    let _ = state\n                        .client\n                        .send_to_node(\n                            topology,\n                            &node_id_ref,\n                            \"PUT\",\n                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                            Some(&body_bytes),\n                            &[],\n                        )\n                        .await;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n                let _ = state\n                    .client\n                    .send_to_node(\n                        topology,\n                        &node_id_ref,\n                        \"DELETE\",\n                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                        None,\n                        &[],\n                    )\n                    .await;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(&state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n    let mut updated = body.0.clone();\n    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n        }\n    }\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn delete_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Reset to default but always include _miroir_shard\n            .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n125\t                .await\n126\t            {\n127\t                Ok(result) => {\n128\t                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n129\t                        if resp.status == 200 {\n130\t                            if let Ok(json) =            for task_value in results {\n133\t                                        if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n134\t                                            all_tasks.push(task);\n135\t                                        }\n136\t                                    }\n137\t                                }\n138\t                            }\n139\t                        }\n140\t                    }\n141\t                }\n142\t                Err(_) => {\n143\t                    failed_nodes += 1;\n144\t                }\n145\t         \"processing\".to_string()\n200\t            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n201\t                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n202\t            } else {\n203\t                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n204\t            };\n205\t\n206\t            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n207\t            let Tasks routes: GET /tasks, GET /tasks/:uid, DELETE /tasks/:uid\n//!\n//! Implements task status aggregation per plan §3:\n//! - Per-task ID reconciliation across nodes\n//! - Aggregated status from all nodes\n//! - Task deletion support\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, Query, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse axum::routing::get(get_task).delete(delete_task))\n}\n\n/// Query parameters for tasks list.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct TasksQuery {\n Serialize, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct NodeTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details:
